content:
# Gradient Flow Analysis v84

## Architecture
Transformer-12L

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.752
- Exploding gradient score: 0.256
- Effective depth: 61 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Gradient clipping
- Skip connections
- Layer normalization
- Residual connections

## Recommendation
Increase learning rate in early layers.
